title: Mid-Level Frontend Developer at Hexaware Technologies Global Group

jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Frontend Developer at Hexaware Technologies Global Group
jsonLd.description:
Hexaware Technologies Global Group has an exciting opening for a Frontend Developer at our Howrah office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Hexaware Technologies Global Group:
Hexaware Technologies Global Group is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in AWS

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Referral bonus program
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Howrah, West Bengal, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Hexaware Technologies Global Group!
